name: FutureTech II Acquisition Corp.
summary: In this Report, references to the Company and to we, us and our refer to FutureTech II Acquisition Corp. Formation. We are a blank check company incorporated in Delaware on August 19, 2021. The Company was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses, which we refer to throughout this annual report as our initial business combination (the Business Combination).
